HGSS.389.0001:
Moomoo Farm
Enjoy Our Fresh and Tasty Milk
HGSS.389.0002:
Trainer Tips\f
Use Headbutt on trees to shake
Pokémon out.\f
Different kinds of Pokémon drop out
of trees.\f
Use Headbutt on any tree you see!
HGSS.389.0004:
Baoba: ...Ohh!
What you are holding is...\r
what they call...a Pokédex!\r
Haven’t seen one of those in ages.\f
My name is Baoba!\f
I used to run a Safari Zone in
Fuchsia City, but it was becoming\r
out of date with new entertainment\r
options coming out.\f
I decided to go overseas to learn
the newest technology and open a\r
state-of-the-art Safari Zone\r
in Cianwood.\f
It may be more than a coincidence
that we are chatting.\f
Why don’t we register each other’s
numbers in the Pokégear?\f
I can give you a call once the Safari
Zone is open before I call anyone else!\f
HGSS.389.0007:
Huh, I didn’t expect you to say no.
You can get hard-to-find Pokémon, too.\f
You’ll be able to make good progress
with your Pokédex, too...\f
HGSS.389.0009:
Baoba: I’ll let you know over the
Pokégear once it’s ready!\f
HGSS.389.0010:
Lt. Surge: Hey, you!\f
Don’t you want a good memory of us
together? How about taking a\r
picture with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.389.0011:
Lt. Surge: OK! OK!\f
Show me a very good smile!\f
HGSS.389.0012:
Lt. Surge: Wow!
This turned out to be a really\r
good one!\f
We root for Route 39!
HGSS.389.0013:
Lt. Surge: That’s OK...\f
Let me know if you change your mind.
HGSS.389.0014:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC to delete some pictures
before you come back.
